program.title: Jack Hanna's Passport
program.description160: "Wildlife expert Jack Hanna has explored nearly every place on the planet in search of the most fascinating animals the world has to offer.
program.description750: In Jack Hanna's Passport, viewers join Jack and his family, alongside series host Alfonso Ribeiro, on these incredible adventures around the world as they discover, interact with, and learn about some of Earth's most threatened and endangered species and the conservation and protection efforts to save them. Each week, Jack Hanna's Passport transports viewers to some of the most remote places around the globe, unveiling the natural beauty, unique wildlife, and fascinating cultures that make Earth so special while uncovering fascinating facts about our natural world in a manner accessible and understandable to children aged 13-16."

program.title: U.S. Farm Report

program.description160: A team of news anchors deliver a broadcast that combines in-depth reporting with interviews and segments on entertainment and lifestyle issues.
program.description750: A team of news anchors deliver the latest, breaking news in politics, social issues, entertainment, lifestyle and weather, while they also conduct in-depth interviews with expert analysts and people affected by human-interest stories.

program.title: America's Funniest Home Videos
program.description160: Camcorder footage submitted by real-life people serves to catch them in the midst of unexpected moments of outlandish occurrences and hilarity.

program.title: The Bachelorette
program.description160: A single woman lives in a mansion with a group of potential suitors and must narrow them down to one individual who she believes would be her best match.
program.description750: A single woman lives in a mansion with a group of potential suitors, and as she gets to know each man over a series of group and individual dates, she must narrow them down to one individual who she believes would be her best match.
